summary: Tested Admin Dashboard hierarchical refactor for Categories and Tiles CRUD. All 24 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - Categories (3) and Tiles (18) sections visible in sidebar, CRUD modals working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Categories CRUD API working: GET /api/admin/categories returns 3 categories (love, career, health)
✓ Tiles CRUD API working: GET /api/admin/tiles returns 18 tiles grouped by category
✓ Create/Update/Delete operations verified for both Categories and Tiles
✓ Soft delete (deactivate) and hard delete both working
✓ Seed catalog endpoint correctly detects existing data
✓ Frontend sidebar shows 'Categories (3)' and 'Tiles (18)' under Homepage section
✓ CategoriesManager component displays table with ID, Title, Helper Copy, Order, Active, Actions
✓ TilesManager component displays table with ID, Short Title, Full Title, Category, Icon, Order, Active, Actions
✓ Edit modal populates with existing data and allows updates
✓ Create modal has all required fields with helpful hints
seed_data_creation: Seed data already exists: 3 categories, 18 tiles, 15 topics, 31 experts, 115 tiers
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Dashboard hierarchical refactor complete. Categories (3 main groupings: love, career, health) and Tiles (18 homepage tiles) CRUD fully functional. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_admin_hierarchy_crud.py covers all CRUD operations. Frontend UI at /admin shows Categories and Tiles sections in sidebar under 'Homepage' divider.

backend_api_tests.categories_update: PASS - Updated TEST_finance title and helper_copy
backend_api_tests.tiles_update: PASS - Updated TEST_yoga short_title and full_title
backend_api_tests.seed_catalog: PASS - Detects existing data, returns count
backend_api_tests.unauthorized_access: PASS - All endpoints return 401 without token

frontend_ui_tests.categories_page: PASS - Table shows 3 categories with Edit/Deactivate actions
frontend_ui_tests.tiles_page: PASS - Table shows 18 tiles grouped by category
